---
description: 'Use when touching generated userscript bundle output.'
applyTo: 'linkedin-hide-viewed-jobs.user.js'
---

## Generated File Guardrail

This file is generated by `vite-plugin-monkey` from `src/main.ts` and related `src/**` modules.

1. Do not directly edit this file for normal feature/fix work.
2. Implement behavior changes in `src/**` (and metadata changes in `vite.config.ts`) and rebuild.
3. Only hand-edit this file if the user explicitly requests manual bundle edits.
4. If this file changed unexpectedly, verify `bun run build` output and explain why.
